title: ジャパンCの後に・歪み

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder's chance at victory in the Japan
Cup escapes her. But she wastes no time sulking,
and strengthens her resolve for what will come.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now more determined than ever, she zeroes in on
the upcoming showdown with Maruzensky at the
Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, El Condor Pasa leaves the venue in a
hurry, almost as if running away from Grass
Wonder.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Emotions whirl as the winds grow colder. Winter is
on the horizon, but Grass Wonder's classic year is
far from over yet...
